We have \( F(z) = \frac{z+i}{z-i} \).  
Notice that applying \(F\) twice gives \(F(F(z)) = -\frac{1}{z}\), and applying it four times returns \(z\).  
Thus \(F\) has period 4. Since \(2002 \equiv 2 \pmod{4}\), we have \(z_{2002} = F(F(z_0)) = -\frac{1}{z_0}\).  

Given \(z_0 = \frac{1}{137} + i\), we compute  
\[
-\frac{1}{z_0} = -\frac{1}{\frac{1}{137} + i} = -\frac{1}{\frac{1 + 137i}{137}} = -\frac{137}{1 + 137i}.
\]
